title: Contact — Align Studio Hamilton
description: Book a class, ask a question, or plan your visit to Align Studio in Hamilton.

content.heading: We would love to hear from you
content.subheading: Booking, waitlists, or a quick question — reach out and we will respond within one business day.

content.heading: Visit the studio
paragraphs: Align Studio lives on the first floor above the Riverside retail strip — look for the green door and intercom. Street parking is available on Victoria Street; covered parking is two blocks away at the central car park.
The space is shoe-free: we have lockers for bags and a filtered water station. Arrive five minutes early on your first visit so we can show you the reformer and any props for class.
asideParagraphs: Public holidays: limited timetable — check Instagram for updates.

content.heading: Send a message
content.description: Tell us whether you are new to pilates, interested in a specific class, or looking for private sessions — we will reply with next steps.

content.heading: Prefer to talk?
content.subheading: Call us during opening hours or DM us on Instagram — same friendly team.
